name: Millicast
description: Millicast (Dolby) — real-time WebRTC streaming CDN with sub-500ms latency

seo.title: Millicast — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Millicast: Millicast (Dolby) — real-time WebRTC streaming CDN with sub-500ms latency

when_to_use: Sub-500ms real-time WebRTC broadcast CDN at scale
Ultra-low latency streaming for sports betting and live auctions
WebRTC ingest with WHIP for broadcast-grade live streams
Replacing HLS with sub-second delivery for interactive events
Scalable real-time streaming to 1M+ concurrent viewers

pros: Good fit for auctions, sports betting, iGaming
cons: WebRTC CDN model expensive at huge scale
Integration complexity for large player ecosystems
review.verdict: Best-in-class real-time WebRTC CDN when milliseconds matter — pay for it, but the latency is real.
review.best_for: iGaming, auctions, and sports apps where sub-second latency drives revenue.
review.not_for: VOD-heavy or latency-tolerant streaming — HLS is cheaper.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
